_readme: Maps project identifiers to design systems. Claude checks this on every frontend session. To declare your project's design system, add a .claude/design.json in your project root with { 'system': '<key>' }. Available systems are the keys in 'systems' below.

brutalist.description: Raw, high-contrast, opinionated — bold borders, heavy type, flat color

glassmorphism.description: Frosted glass, blurs, gradients, translucency — modern app aesthetic

corporate-saas.description: Professional SaaS — Stripe, Notion, Vercel landing page quality

dark-modern.description: Developer-tool dark UI — VS Code, Vercel dashboard, Raycast dark

ai-saas.description: AI-first SaaS — Cursor, Perplexity, Linear, Clerk. Precision dark UI built for intelligent products. Dense, geometric, one strong accent, command-palette aesthetics.
